description_long: This is a round, dark-colored hanging planter or bucket with a ribbed exterior surface and a wide open top. The vessel is suspended by three evenly spaced metal chains that converge at a single point above the rim, allowing it to be hung from a hook or support. The rim of the bucket is slightly thicker and lighter in color, providing structural reinforcement and a visual accent. The interior appears empty and is consistent in color with the exterior, suggesting it is made from the same material. The overall form is symmetrical and the chains are attached securely to the rim, indicating it is designed to hold soil or other contents safely. The object is utilitarian yet decorative, suitable for urban outdoor or garden environments.
description: A round, ribbed dark hanging bucket or planter with three metal chains attached to its rim for suspension. The vessel has a wide open top and a reinforced rim, making it both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from a slight angle, showing the ribbed texture and the attachment points of the three chains on the rim.
description_view_1: This view centers the bucket, highlighting the symmetry of the chain attachments and the even curvature of the rim.
description_view_2: The bucket is rotated, showing the side profile and the consistent ribbed pattern, with the chains slightly offset.
description_view_3: A rear angle view, emphasizing the roundness and depth of the bucket, with the chains converging above.
